data.description:
An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”.
  
  
**Powering the Future with AIDA**
To lead the next phase of our AI evolution, we’ve launched a new business unit AIDA – Artificial Intelligence & Data Analytics – a strategic engine driving our transformation designed to scale our AI ambitions with precision and purpose. This marks a pivotal shift in how we operate, innovate, and serve to embed intelligence into every layer of our business.
  
  
At Singtel, this is more than a technology upgrade. It’s a strategic transformation that redefines how value is created across the enterprise core— augmenting human capabilities and unlocking entirely new potential. It is a transformation journey by aligning people, platforms, and processes under one cohesive strategy. Our mission is to build AI literacy, and foster a culture where intelligence empowers people.
  
  
We welcome you to join us on a transformational journey that’s reshaping the telecommunications industry — and redefining what’s possible with AI at its core. Grow with us in a workplace that champions innovation, embraces agility, and puts human potential at the heart of everything we do.
  
  
The UX & UI Experience Designer and Tester will be responsible for designing intuitive, engaging, and accessible user experiences for AI and digital transformation initiatives.
  
  
Working closely with the Product Owner and cross-functional teams, this role ensures that user needs are translated into effective design solutions and UI solutions, and validates these solutions through usability testing, feedback and iterative refinement.
  
  
The designer will support both conceptual and detailed design efforts, including wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI designs, while playing a critical role in ensuring solution usability, visual consistency and adoption.
  
  

- User Research and Experience Design
- Conduct user research, interviews, and contextual inquiries to understand user needs, behaviours, pain points and understand AI product needs.
- Create user personas, journey maps, and experience flows to inform solution design.
- Translate business and functional requirements into interaction models, wireframes, user task flows, screen designs, prototypes and UI details that promote ease of use and optimize the user experience to support usability and user-centered design.
- Expertise in information architecture directly supporting AI decision trees and content hierarchies.
- Assist in integrating branding and consistent visual languages across multiple AI platforms.
- Design interactions and animations tailored for AI outputs, such as conversational agents, Agentic AI, predictive text.
- Collaborative Design Delivery
- Work closely with Product Owner, developers, and stakeholders to co-design solutions aligned with project goals.
- Participate in agile ceremonies and incorporate feedback from sprints and demos into iterative design improvements.
- Ensure design consistency, accessibility, and adherence to UI/UX best practices across AI applications.
- Usability Testing and Feedback Loop
- Design and execute usability test plans, including task-based testing, A/B testing, and surveys.
- Analyze test results to identify usability issues, collect actionable insights, and propose design enhancements.
- Support user acceptance testing (UAT) by validating the final implementation against design intent and user requirements.
- Documentation and Design Assets
- Develop and maintain design documentation including design systems, screen specifications, color palettes, typography, icons, buttons, annotated prototypes and other visual elements specific to AI UI.
- Create user guides or onboarding materials to facilitate solution adoption when needed.
- Continuous Improvement and Innovation
- Monitor post-implementation user experience and recommend enhancements.
- Analyze competitive interfaces to identify design opportunities and gaps in AI-driven applications.
- Stay up to date with UX/UI trends, tools, and AI interface design patterns to inform solution improvement.

**Skills For Success**

- 5 - 8 years of experience in UI/UX design and testing
- Experience in Customer/User journey maps and experience flows.
- Good to have experience in AI, analytics, or process automation.
- Good to have experience in Workshop facilitation and storytelling for design justification.
- Good to have experience in designing conversation flows, error handling, and multi-turn interactions for AI chatbots or virtual assistants.
- Proficiency in design tools – Figma, Usability testing techniques and Prototyping and wireframing

company_object.name: Singtel
company_object.long_description:
Singtel is Asia's leading communications technology group, providing a portfolio of services from next-generation communication, 5G and technology services to infotainment to both consumers and businesses. The Group has presence in Asia, Australia and Africa and reaches over 740 million mobile customers in 21 countries. Its infrastructure and technology services for businesses span 21 countries, with more than 428 direct points of presence in 362 cities.  

For consumers, Singtel delivers a complete and integrated suite of services, including mobile, broadband and TV. For businesses, Singtel offers a complementary array of workforce mobility solutions, data hosting, cloud, network infrastructure, analytics and cyber security capabilities. 

Singtel is dedicated to continuous innovation, harnessing next-generation technologies to create new and exciting customer experiences as we shape a more sustainable, digital future. The Group’s purpose is grounded in empowering our people to innovate better ways to connect with customers, unlock new possibilities for future businesses to thrive and foster a sense of ownership and belonging to better serve our stakeholders, partners and communities.

Follow us on Twitter at www.twitter.com/SingtelNews. 
Find us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/singtel/

data.description:
At Singtel, we believe in the strength of a vibrant, diverse and inclusive workforce where backgrounds, perspectives and life experiences of our people help us innovate and create strong connections with our customers. We strive to ensure all our people practices are non-discriminatory and provide a fair, performance-based work culture that is diverse, inclusive and collaborative.
  
  
Join us and experience what it’s like to be with an Employer of Choice\*. Together, let’s create a brighter digital future for all. \*Awarded at the HR Fest Awards 2020.
  
  
Singtel Networks, the most established telecommunications infrastructure provider in Singapore is transforming to enable the digital generation of tomorrow. We are introducing new capabilities in 5G, Cloud, Analytics, Digital Commerce, Software Engineering, Cyber Security to enhance our core competencies and deliver innovative and differentiated Mobile and Fixed services (Broadband, TV and Telephony) for our customers. We are committed to celebrating inclusion and diversity and is a strong believer to upskill and nurture all individuals. Come join us today as we build Singtel’s Networks of tomorrow, and Empower Every Generation to live, work and play in new ways!
  
  
**Make An Impact By**

- Lead the team to operate and manage the GPON network, inclusive of Nokia, Huawei and ZTE OLTs
- Monitor and take remedial action on pro-actively and reactively detected services and network infrastructure faults till closure.
- Mange the operation issues, escalate chronic/technically complex cases to the Vendors and follow-up till closure.
- Ensure that technical and managerial escalation and communication to stake holders are done whenever necessary.
- Documenting all Incidents and events through Incident ticketing system.
- Mange the operation issues, escalate chronic/technically complex cases to the Vendors and follow-up till closure.
- Ensure that technical and managerial escalation and communication to stake holders are done whenever necessary.
- Documenting all Incidents and events through Incident ticketing system.
- Liaise and coordinate with internal stake holders, equipment and service providers and partners to ensure swift and efficient resolution of faults.
- Schedule and execute pre-planned operation activities for new OLTs, network optimization, software upgrade and so on.
- Impact analysis and process review on scheduled changes / faults / outage on Consumer GPON networks (e.g. fiber cuts, service migration, hardware failure…)
- Identify areas of improvements to reduce Infrastructure faults and improve monitoring capability.
- Monitor monthly report on Infrastructure fault rate, trending and provide the best suggestion/solution to reduce such fault/call-in rate.
- Perform preventive and corrective maintenance like network device hardware and software upgrade.
- Plan and monitor the ZTE C300 to C600 migration progress and ensure no data mismatch and all subscribers/PON port are in good shape after the migration.
- Up keeping of GPON network infrastructure information and records.

**Skills For Success**

- Degree from Information Technology or Electrical Engineering.
- 1 year of relevant working experience.

**Rewards that Go Beyond**

- Full suite of health and wellness benefits
- Ongoing training and development programs
- Internal mobility opportunities

**Are you ready to say hello to BIG Possibilities?**
**Take the leap with Singtel to unlock new opportunities and accelerate your growth. Apply now and start your empowering career!**

data.description:
**Join the Growing Team at Singtel Financial Shared Services in Malaysia\*!**
Are you ready to embark in the exciting world of finance and technology?
**Singtel Financial Shared Services (FSS)**
is expanding its operations in Malaysia, and we're looking for passionate, driven individuals to join our dynamic team!
  
  
In Malaysia, Singtel Group operates through a fully owned subsidiary called Sudong Sdn. Bhd.
  
  
**Why Singtel Finance Shared Services?**

- Grow Your Financial Digital Literacy: Enhance your expertise in the latest financial technologies and practices in a collaborative, fast-paced shared services environment.
- Impactful Work: Contribute to global operations while making a tangible impact on how businesses manage their financial operations.
- Career Growth: As we expand, you'll have plenty of opportunities to learn, grow, and advance in your career.

The
**Sales Commission Executive**
is responsible to ensure all commissions are accurately calculated in accordance with the commission schemes and paid out according to the agreed schedule. The role is required to provide excellent support to business units, maintains proper and up‑to‑date documentation of operational processes and procedures, communicates and shares commission updates or payout results with analysis to the respective BUs, and supports User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
  
  
**Make An Impact By**

- To process Sales Partners’ Activation Incentive (AI) & Marketing Support Fund (MSF) and other Sales Commission & Incentives accurately and timely.
- To verify, investigate, analyse root causes and resolve disputes / claims raised by Channel Sales, Sales Agents and Sales Partners.
- To prepare AI & MSF payment summary, payment requisition and raise Service Entry & Service Order in Global Trading Post (GTP) for approval.
- To liaise with Order Processing Team, Sales Teams, Finance, Sales Partners and Other Support Teams in clarifying / rectifying sales claims that were rejected and raised as discrepancy claims.
- To update and maintain all payout records, master data files and do backup to keep track on all such info in our Commission folders.
- To ensure documentation on operation processes & procedures are properly updated, maintained and available for use.
- To ensure proper housekeeping of documents for reference and audit purposes.
- To review current processes & participate in contributing ideas / suggestions for improvement.
- To assist Team Leader or Team Member in providing Sales Partners’ commission data trend as and when required from other Departments.
- To Support UAT activities.
- Perform other related tasks or ad-hoc duties as assigned by the reporting manager.

**Skills For Success**

- At least Diploma/ Bachelor Degree.
- 2-3 years of relevant working experience in Sales computing or Billing.
- Highly proficient in MS Office, especially Excel (Vlookup and Pivot Table), Powerpoint with good analytical skills.
- Prior working experience in UAT or system testing.
- Has good inter-personal, communication skill & good work attitude.
- Great attention to detail and numbers.
- Well rounded candidate; able to work independently and as a team player.
- Working experience in IT background and system testing experience using VBA and Macros, RPA or Python will be highly advantageous.

**Join us on our mission to continue defining the future of financial services. Apply Now!**

data.description:
**Powering the Future with AIDA**
To lead the next phase of our AI evolution, we’ve launched a new business unit
**AIDA**
–
**Artificial Intelligence & Data Analytics**
– a strategic engine driving our transformation designed to scale our AI ambitions with precision and purpose.This marks a
**pivotal shift**
in how we operate, innovate, and serve to embed intelligence into every layer of our business.
  
  
At
**Singtel**
, this is more than a technology upgrade. It’s a
**strategic transformation**
that redefines how value is created across the enterprise core—
**augmenting human capabilities**
and unlocking entirely new potential. It is a transformation journey by aligning
**people, platforms, and processes**
under one cohesive strategy. Our mission is to build
**AI literacy**
, and foster a culture where
**intelligence empowers people**
.
  
  
**We welcome you to join us**
on a transformational journey that’s reshaping the telecommunications industry — and redefining what’s possible with AI at its core.
**Grow with us**
in a workplace that champions
**innovation**
, embraces
**agility**
, and puts
**human potential**
at the heart of everything we do.
  
  
**Be a Part of Something BIG!**
We are seeking a Senior AI Solution Designer who will translate business needs into clear AI enabled solutions, workflow logic and user journeys. This role focuses on providing end to end solution design for AI and automation use cases, ensuring alignment with enterprise standards and the AI platform capabilities. You will work closely with Solution Architects, AI Engineering Tech Leads, Product Owners and business stakeholders to design solutions that are practical, scalable and operationally ready.
  
  
You will be responsible for shaping solution options, validating if a request requires AI, automation or process enhancement, and ensuring that the proposed design fits enterprise constraints. The role requires strong analytical ability, solid understanding of AI platform capabilities, familiarity with no code and low code tools, and the ability to prepare solution design documentation for governance review. This is a design-oriented role rather than a full time development or coding role, but requires enough technical fluency to prototype concepts, validate feasibility and guide implementation teams.
  
  
**Make An Impact By**

- Translate business needs into user journeys, AI features, workflow logic and clear solution specifications that can be executed by the technical teams.
- Provide end to end solution design for complex AI and automation use cases, mapping business requirements to AI platform capabilities and system integration needs.
- Specialise in mapping business problems to AI capabilities such as RAG, summarisation, classification, extraction, conversational flows and agent based logic.
- Design AI enabled workflows including branching logic, prompt flow, human in the loop steps and exception handling. Familiarize with Agentic AI capabilities and AI Workflow such as n8n (or equivalent)
- Capable to consult and explain the behaviour related to AI performance such as token usage, latency, response patterns and model constraints.
- Prepare Solution Review Board (SRB) documents, ensuring all designs meet the technical, security and operational requirements for governance clearance.
- Conduct rapid AI prototyping to validate design concepts using AI tools, no code or low code, simple pro code platforms and reusable components from the enterprise AI platform.
- Collaborate closely with Solution Architect, AI Engineer Tech Lead and Product Owner to ensure the proposed solution addresses business problems in a feasible and scalable way.
- Work with process and service designers to jointly develop the combined AI and automation solution, including the design of workflows that may use AI workflow tools.
- Master the use of no code and low code AI tools, workflow products and automation platforms to accelerate solution ideation and prototyping.
- Engage and work with system owners, integration teams and domain experts to identify dependencies, data availability, API readiness and the linkage needed for the end to end solution.
- Assess incoming requests to advise whether the solution requires AI or ML, automation, simple rule engines or process re design, and provide a clear recommendation.
- Document the full solution design including architecture, data flow, workflow, API requirements, UI or journey considerations, guardrail requirements and operational needs.
- Own the operational design and stability of the solutions, defining monitoring, alerting, and lifecycle management strategies. You will oversee and support the troubleshooting of complex issues in distributed systems during implementation and operation.
- Drive the design and scoping of technical prototypes and proofs-of-concept to validate new solution designs and technologies, defining a clear path from concept to production.
- Support design of technical prototypes and proof of concept work to validate assumptions, integration patterns and user experience before full scale delivery.
- Ensure solution designs comply with AI architecture standards, security, PDPA requirements, model governance, AI guardrail policies and enterprise integration patterns. Promote reusable solution design patterns and AI component and design pattern from central platform team.
- Participate in troubleshooting discussions during implementation to ensure alignment with the original design intent.
- Maintain a catalog of reusable design patterns, workflow templates and reference architectures to improve consistency and shorten design cycles. Sync up and align with the central platform team.
- Keep updated with enterprise platform capabilities and emerging AI or automation technologies to recommend new approaches for business needs.
- Serve as the design bridge between business teams, data science, AI engineering, software development teams and platform teams.

**Skills For Success**

- Bachelor or Master degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems or related technical field.
- Candidates with training in AI, business systems or solution architecture are preferred.
- More than 5 years of experience in solution design, solution architecture or senior technical design roles.
- Experience designing AI or automation solutions in enterprise environments with complex processes and multiple system dependencies.
- Strong ability to translate business needs into AI enabled features, workflow logic and solution specifications.
- Familiarity with AI platform capabilities including RAG services, model hosting, inference gateways, guardrails, vector stores and prompt orchestration.
- Hands on experience with no code or low code AI tools, workflow tools and automation platforms.
- Good understanding of API integration patterns, system dependencies and the architecture of enterprise applications.
- Ability to create AI prototypes using available platform tools to validate design concepts.
- Strong understanding of user journeys, service design principles and workflow re design.
- Comfortable working with cloud services and on premise components to design solutions that work in hybrid environments.
- Ability to prepare high quality documentation for governance and technical review.
- Experience participating in design discussions for AI, automation or digital transformation initiatives.
- Strong analytical and problem solving ability with good judgement in selecting the right solution type for the business need.
- Ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non technical stakeholders.
- Collaborative mindset with ability to bring diverse teams together to align on solution direction.
- Strong documentation skills and attention to detail when preparing design artefacts.
- Curious learner with strong interest in new AI, automation and workflow tools.

**Are you ready to say hello to BIG Possibilities?**
**Take the leap with Singtel to unlock new opportunities and accelerate your growth. Apply now and start your empowering career!**

data.description:
At Singtel, we believe in the strength of a vibrant, diverse and inclusive workforce where backgrounds, perspectives and life experiences of our people help us innovate and create strong connections with our customers. We strive to ensure all our people practices are non-discriminatory and provide a fair, performance-based work culture that is diverse, inclusive and collaborative.
  
  
Join us and experience what it’s like to be with an Employer of Choice\*. Together, let’s create a brighter digital future for all. \*Awarded at the HR Fest Awards 2020.
  
  
**Be a Part of Something BIG!**
Singtel is at the forefront of technological advancements, enhancing customer experiences across mobile, voice, data infrastructure, managed services, cloud computing, IT services, and professional consulting. To support this journey, Singtel is seeking an experienced Senior Solution Designer to join the Group IT – Corporate HR Systems team, with a focus on payroll systems.
  
  
This role will act as the Subject Matter Expert (SME) for payroll technology, responsible for designing, implementing, and supporting enterprise payroll solutions across cloud-based HR platforms. The incumbent will drive solution architecture, ensure compliance with statutory requirements, and lead system enhancements while maintaining high standards of system performance, accuracy, and reliability.
  
  
The role requires close collaboration with HR, Finance, and IT stakeholders, as well as external vendors, to deliver scalable, secure, and efficient payroll solutions aligned with business objectives.
  
  
**Make An Impact By**
**Delivery & Maintenance of HR Payroll Systems (approximately 90% of time focused)**

- Design and deliver payroll solutions aligned to business requirements across SaaS platforms
- Drive standardization and adoption of best practices across payroll processes and system implementations
- Provide primary support for payroll systems including payroll processing cycles, integrations, data validation, and statutory configurations (e.g., taxes, compliance requirements)
- Manage technical payroll configurations, including schemas, rules, and, ensuring system stability, data accuracy, and compliance with local regulations and statutory reporting requirements.
- Drive system enhancements and changes, including SIT/UAT coordination, functional documentation, and release management within packaged solution environments.
- Drive system enhancements and changes, including SIT/UAT coordination, functional documentation, and release management within packaged solution environments.
- Perform root cause analysis to resolve complex system issues and lead continuous improvement efforts to enhance payroll and HR system performance
- Act as the key liaison between HR, Finance, and IT stakeholders, collaborating with vendors and partners to facilitate meetings and ensure successful solution adoption.
- Participate in bi-annual HRSP upgrades and system maintenance activities for the payroll system, ensuring smooth transitions and minimal business disruption.
- Support penetration testing activities and audits for HR systems, ensuring compliance with security standards and addressing identified vulnerabilities.
- Contribute to application strategy, roadmap planning, and continuous improvement initiatives
- Evaluate and recommend new technologies or enhancements to improve existing solutions

**Payroll Technology Advancement & Capability Development (approximately 10% of time focused)**

- Stay updated with industry trends, payroll technologies, and SaaS platforms, or similar, and apply this knowledge to enhance existing payroll solutions
- Continuously build and strengthen technical and functional expertise to support system upgrades, enhancements, and payroll platform improvements
- Develop skills in cloud-based payroll platforms, integrations, and application runtime environments to support modern payroll architecture
- Upskill on emerging technologies and tools to improve payroll system performance, scalability, and reliability.

**Skills For Success**

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.
- More than 8 years’ experience in IT consulting or project delivery with HRMS, with at least 5 years of hands-on experience (both functional and configuration), 2 of those supporting Singapore Payroll.
- Proven track record of end-to-end implementation of at least 2 full cycle of payroll system.
- Working experience with the following: Payroll Parallel Runs, Regular / Off-cycle Payroll Runs, Configuration of Payroll / Time Schemas, Tax Calculation, Payroll replications.
- Proficiency in HR Cloud Technologies, Statutory Compliance & Payroll Regulations and Payroll Integration & Data Management

**Are you ready to say hello to BIG Possibilities?**
**Take the leap with Singtel to unlock new opportunities and accelerate your growth. Apply now and start your empowering career!**

data.description:
As a
**Cybersecurity Operations Engineer**
, you will play a key role in safeguarding enterprise systems, data, and infrastructure across IT and OT environments. This role focuses on operational security excellence, including continuous monitoring, threat detection, incident response, and security engineering, while supporting compliance and resilience objectives.
  
  
You will work closely with the CISO office, SOC, IT, OT, and engineering teams to ensure security controls are effectively designed, implemented, and operated. This role is suited for individuals who enjoy hands-on security operations and engineering in complex, fast-moving environments.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
Operational Security Management
  
  

- Operate, maintain, and continuously improve cybersecurity tools such as SIEM, IDS/IPS, EDR, PAM, vulnerability scanners, and log management platforms.
- Perform system and platform hardening, patch management, and network segmentation in line with security best practices.

Threat & Vulnerability Management
  
  

- Coordinate vulnerability assessment and penetration testing (VAPT) activities with internal teams and external service providers.
- Manage security findings from penetration testing, red teaming exercises, and bug bounty programmes, working with stakeholders to prioritise and remediate risks.
- Recommend appropriate mitigations and implementation actions to address identified vulnerabilities.
- Track remediation activities, security deviations, and risk acceptances through to closure.

Security Engineering & Architecture
  
  

- Partner with the CISO office to conduct security architecture reviews, evaluating the design and effectiveness of security controls across systems and networks.
- Collaborate with SOC, IT, OT, DevOps, and Physical Security teams to ensure cybersecurity operations align with enterprise architecture and operational requirements.
- Support the integration of advanced monitoring, detection, and security automation capabilities in line with organisational standards.

Incident Monitoring & Response
  
  

- Monitor security events and alerts, detecting, containing, and remediating security incidents in a timely manner.
- Handle incident escalations from the SOC, performing deep-dive technical analysis and coordinating with engineering teams to resolve complex security issues.
- Monitor and respond to indicators of compromise (IOCs) and emerging threat intelligence to reduce exposure to known threat vectors.

Compliance & Risk Management
  
  

- Implement and validate technical controls to support regulatory requirements and internal security policies.
- Conduct ongoing risk assessments and contribute to continuous improvements in security posture.
- Provide technical input and evidence to support internal and external audits.

**Skills And Experience**

- Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Security, or a related discipline, or equivalent practical experience.
- Proven experience in cybersecurity operations or security engineering roles.
- Hands-on experience with security technologies such as SIEM, EDR, IDS/IPS, PAM, and vulnerability management tools.
- Strong understanding of application security, network security, system hardening, and incident response practices.
- Familiarity with both IT and OT security environments is an advantage.
- Professional certifications such as OSCP, CREST, CISSP, CISM, or equivalent are beneficial but not mandatory.
- Ability to manage multiple priorities effectively in a dynamic operational environment.
- Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.

**Rewards that Go Beyond**

- Flexible work arrangements
- Full suite of health and wellness benefits
- Ongoing training and development programs
- Internal mobility opportunities

**Your Career Growth Starts Here. Apply Now!**

data.description:
**Be A Part of Something BIG!**
This
**Senior Engineer, Compute Services**
will be responsible for the design, engineering, and operations of the on-premises private cloud platform, with a primary focus on Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization and Containerization and secondary expertise in VMware, Nutanix and HyperV. The role covers end-to-end ownership of virtualization and compute services, including architecture design, integration, automation, and lifecycle management.
  
  
He/ She will act as a Level 3 subject matter expert, providing advanced support for OpenShift, VMware, Nutanix, Hyper-V, and compute infrastructure.
  
  
**Make An Impact By**

- Design, implement, and maintain the infrastructures and automation covering on-premises Data Centres
- Design and maintain Virtualization infrastructure in covering on-premises data centres, Openshift Virtualization, VMWare, Nutanix or HyperV.
- Drive Process, Quality, Productivity, and Security improvements within the domain
- Works with other technology groups in resolving production issues, including security related issues
- Responsible for capacity planning of Compute infrastructure, including licensing and vendor support related engagements. Also includes obsolescence management
- Work with Change Management to propose and implement changes, especially for patching and migrations.
- Document and communicate Enterprise Infrastructure strategies and standards
- Ensure solution compliance and integration with enterprise architecture and Infosec policy for Infrastructure and Security systems by reviewing and advising on new and existing Information Technology projects

**Skills For Success**

- Degree in computer science/ Information Technology, Industry certification, esp on CKA or RedHat Openshift, MS Azure, VMware (VCP/VCAP) , Nutanix and Microsoft Windows qualifications
- 8-10 years of experience working and familiar with corporate infra design, security hygiene and best practices, compute/storage infrastructure operations and experience in putting together infrastructure runbook covering the aspects above.
- Strong hands-on expertise in Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization and Containerization, including cluster design, deployment, lifecycle management, and automation using Infrastructure-as-Code (Ansible, Terraform, scripting) to deliver scalable, secure, and high-performing on-prem cloud environments.
- Experience in Virtualisation (VMware, Hyper-V, Nutanix), OS (RHEL, Windows), Compute/Storage (Dell EMC, IBM, UCS) and Hyper Converge (HCI) deployment.
- Experience in maintaining Windows & Linux Operating systems, including security hardening, patching, and automation.
- Experience in deploying large scale IT infrastructure.
- Able to articulate well on proposed design to stakeholder.
- Experience in dealing with vendors on technology and services

**Your Career Growth Starts Here. Apply Now!**

company_object.name: Singtel
company_object.long_description:
Singtel is Asia's leading communications technology group, providing a portfolio of services from next-generation communication, 5G and technology services to infotainment to both consumers and businesses. The Group has presence in Asia, Australia and Africa and reaches over 740 million mobile customers in 21 countries. Its infrastructure and technology services for businesses span 21 countries, with more than 428 direct points of presence in 362 cities.  

For consumers, Singtel delivers a complete and integrated suite of services, including mobile, broadband and TV. For businesses, Singtel offers a complementary array of workforce mobility solutions, data hosting, cloud, network infrastructure, analytics and cyber security capabilities. 

Singtel is dedicated to continuous innovation, harnessing next-generation technologies to create new and exciting customer experiences as we shape a more sustainable, digital future. The Group’s purpose is grounded in empowering our people to innovate better ways to connect with customers, unlock new possibilities for future businesses to thrive and foster a sense of ownership and belonging to better serve our stakeholders, partners and communities.

Follow us on Twitter at www.twitter.com/SingtelNews. 
Find us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/singtel/

data.description:
An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”.
  
  
The role of Support Engineer is to provide support to the infrastructure and platform services defined by the respective customers/projects by Service Levels.
  
  
**Make An Impact By**

- Identify and apply appropriate Infrastructure and Platform operational best practices.
- Deploy, manage, and operate Public Cloud, Private Cloud, On-premises system and Hybrid Cloud environments.
- implement automation, where appropriate, to streamline provisioning, de-provisioning, and system management processes.
- Proactively monitor and measure Infrastructure performance and availability and implement corrective actions to improve reliability and efficiency.
- Manage infrastructure and Platform changes through formal change request processes and provide status updates to relevant stakeholders.
- Document and maintain infrastructure configurations and provide regular operational reports to relevant parties.
- Respond promptly to incidents, investigate issues, and provide temporary and/or permanent resolutions for escalated incidents, with timely status updates.
- Support service continuity measures, including backup and restore procedures and disaster recovery planning, to ensure continuous business operations.
- Adhere to security standards and best practices to prevent security breaches and reduce Infrastructure vulnerabilities; support security audits and implement required corrective or preventive actions.
- Provide 24×7 standby support, as required.

**Skills For Success**

- Diploma/ bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
- Minimum 1–2 years of hands-on experience in IT infrastructure operations is preferred. However, candidates with strong knowledge will be considered.
- Strong hands-on experience with virtualisation and private cloud/Public technologies.
- Demonstrated experience administering system and network infrastructure.
- Practical experience with monitoring, performance management, and capacity planning for infrastructure.
- Strong background in incident management, including troubleshooting complex issues, performing root cause analysis, and implementing permanent corrective actions.

data.description:
**Be a part of something BIG!**
The
**Senior Solution Designer (OSS/BSS)**
is responsible to o wn and lead the end-to-end platform solution design and delivery for Core Systems within Singtel Group IT, ensuring alignment with architecture roadmaps, security standards, and business needs across the full platform lifecycle.
  
  
**Make An Impact By**

- End-to-end ownership of platform solution design, delivery, quality, and lifecycle management
- Ensure solutions comply with enterprise architecture standards and information security policies
- Gather requirements, perform impact assessments, and translate business needs into scalable, robust solutions
- Act as a key bridge between business stakeholders and delivery teams
- Support platforms across all phases including design, delivery, operations, and enhancements
- Collaborate with vendors and internal teams to proactively identify and remove delivery blockers

**Skills For Success**

- 7+ years of experience in system development and solution design
- Strong OSS (PCRF, OCS) and BSS domain expertise
- Telecom experience across Mobile, Roaming, and Wholesale Billing
- MVNE / 6D product experience (required / highly valued)
- Proven track record in solution design and platform ownership
- Hands-on Java development on Linux, cloud, and container-based platforms
- Strong SQL skills (MySQL; Oracle/PostgreSQL exposure is a plus)
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines and code quality tools
- Solid understanding of system integration and API design (TMF APIs preferred)
- Knowledge of infrastructure, networking, and information security (application, OS, network)
- Strong troubleshooting skills including network tracing (Wireshark) and automation/CI tools (e.g. Jenkins)

**Your Career Growth Starts Here. Apply Now!**

data.description:
An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”.
  
  
**Make An Impact By**

- Design Kubernetes cluster architecture
- Define deployment models for:
- Red Hat OpenShift (on-prem)
- Amazon EKS, Azure AKS, Google Kubernetes Engine (cloud)
- Deploy and configure Kubernetes/OpenShift clusters
- Implement control plane and worker node setup
- Develop Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for cluster provisioning
- Build reusable templates / golden images for clusters
- Implement GitOps pipelines for deployment
- Standardize Dev/UAT/Prod environments
- Deploy monitoring and logging stack (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)
- Define baseline alerts, thresholds, and dashboards
- Integrate with enterprise monitoring / ticketing systems
- Provide 24×7 standby support, as required.

**Skills For Success**

- Diploma/ bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
- Minimal 3–5 years of working experience with Kubernetes (K8s) architecture and operations.
- Strong hands-on experience with virtualization, container platform and private cloud/Public technologies.
- Practical experience with monitoring, performance management, and capacity planning for infrastructure.
- Strong background in incident management, including troubleshooting complex issues, performing root cause analysis, and implementing permanent corrective actions.

**Platform Build & Engineering (Day-1)**

- Design, deploy, and configure Kubernetes clusters (on-prem and cloud-based)
- Implement container platforms using OpenShift or managed Kubernetes (EKS, AKS, GKE)
- Define cluster architecture, networking (CNI), ingress/egress, and storage integration
- Automate infrastructure provisioning using IaC tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible)

**Operations & Support (Day-2)**

- Perform cluster administration, monitoring, and performance tuning
- Manage upgrades, patching, and lifecycle of Kubernetes/OpenShift environments
- Troubleshoot cluster, pod, networking, and application issues
- Ensure platform availability, resiliency, and backup/recovery readiness

**Observability & Automation**

- Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)
- Build CI/CD pipelines integrating container platforms
- Automate operational tasks and standardize runbooks/SOPs

Singtel is Asia's leading communications technology group, providing a portfolio of services from next-generation communication, 5G and technology services to infotainment to both consumers and businesses. Singtel is dedicated to continuous innovation, harnessing next-generation technologies to create new and exciting customer experiences as we shape a more sustainable, digital future. The Group’s purpose is grounded in empowering our people to innovate better ways to connect with customers, unlock new possibilities for future businesses to thrive and foster a sense of ownership and belonging to better serve our stakeholders, partners and communities.

Find us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/singtel/

data.description:
An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”.
  
  
**Powering the Future with AIDA**
To lead the next phase of our AI evolution, we’ve launched a new business unit AIDA – Artificial Intelligence & Data Analytics – a strategic engine driving our transformation designed to scale our AI ambitions with precision and purpose. This marks a pivotal shift in how we operate, innovate, and serve to embed intelligence into every layer of our business.
  
  
At Singtel, this is more than a technology upgrade. It’s a strategic transformation that redefines how value is created across the enterprise core— augmenting human capabilities and unlocking entirely new potential. It is a transformation journey by aligning people, platforms, and processes under one cohesive strategy. Our mission is to build AI literacy, and foster a culture where intelligence empowers people.
  
  
We welcome you to join us on a transformational journey that’s reshaping the telecommunications industry — and redefining what’s possible with AI at its core. Grow with us in a workplace that champions innovation, embraces agility, and puts human potential at the heart of everything we do.
  
  
The UX & UI Experience Designer and Tester will be responsible for designing intuitive, engaging, and accessible user experiences for AI and digital transformation initiatives.
  
  
Working closely with the Product Owner and cross-functional teams, this role ensures that user needs are translated into effective design solutions and UI solutions, and validates these solutions through usability testing, feedback and iterative refinement.
  
  
The designer will support both conceptual and detailed design efforts, including wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI designs, while playing a critical role in ensuring solution usability, visual consistency and adoption.
  
  

- User Research and Experience Design
- Conduct user research, interviews, and contextual inquiries to understand user needs, behaviours, pain points and understand AI product needs.
- Create user personas, journey maps, and experience flows to inform solution design.
- Translate business and functional requirements into interaction models, wireframes, user task flows, screen designs, prototypes and UI details that promote ease of use and optimize the user experience to support usability and user-centered design.
- Expertise in information architecture directly supporting AI decision trees and content hierarchies.
- Assist in integrating branding and consistent visual languages across multiple AI platforms.
- Design interactions and animations tailored for AI outputs, such as conversational agents, Agentic AI, predictive text.
- Collaborative Design Delivery
- Work closely with Product Owner, developers, and stakeholders to co-design solutions aligned with project goals.
- Participate in agile ceremonies and incorporate feedback from sprints and demos into iterative design improvements.
- Ensure design consistency, accessibility, and adherence to UI/UX best practices across AI applications.
- Usability Testing and Feedback Loop
- Design and execute usability test plans, including task-based testing, A/B testing, and surveys.
- Analyze test results to identify usability issues, collect actionable insights, and propose design enhancements.
- Support user acceptance testing (UAT) by validating the final implementation against design intent and user requirements.
- Documentation and Design Assets
- Develop and maintain design documentation including design systems, screen specifications, color palettes, typography, icons, buttons, annotated prototypes and other visual elements specific to AI UI.
- Create user guides or onboarding materials to facilitate solution adoption when needed.
- Continuous Improvement and Innovation
- Monitor post-implementation user experience and recommend enhancements.
- Analyze competitive interfaces to identify design opportunities and gaps in AI-driven applications.
- Stay up to date with UX/UI trends, tools, and AI interface design patterns to inform solution improvement.

**Skills For Success**

- 5 - 8 years of experience in UI/UX design and testing
- Experience in Customer/User journey maps and experience flows.
- Good to have experience in AI, analytics, or process automation.
- Good to have experience in Workshop facilitation and storytelling for design justification.
- Good to have experience in designing conversation flows, error handling, and multi-turn interactions for AI chatbots or virtual assistants.
- Proficiency in design tools – Figma, Usability testing techniques and Prototyping and wireframing
